title: 1.1: Reports how the IO loop handles incoming data when parser buffers fill (e.g., vt_parser_has_space_for_input check, POLLIN flag management)
1.2: Identifies buffering mechanisms in the child monitor, VT parser (e.g., read buffer size limits, BUF_SZ constant)
1.3: States the graphics storage quota system (e.g., apply_storage_quota function, storage_limit parameter)
1.4: Reports write buffer management and overflow handling (e.g., 100MB write buffer limit, buffer reallocation)
1.5: Identifies the code location where backpressure decisions occur (e.g., child-monitor.c, graphics.c, vt-parser.c)
1.6: States non blocking write behavior (e.g., EWOULDBLOCK handling, EAGAIN response)
1.7: Reports input delay, wakeup coalescing mechanism (e.g., input_delay option, has_pending_wakeups flag)
1.8: Identifies disk cache management for graphics (e.g., defragmentation when size_on_disk exceeds total_size * 2, hole reclamation)
1.9: Reports observable signs of backpressure (e.g., rendering pauses, ENOSPC errors, timing delays)
